issues.description: TrashFromHand should be optional ("You may trash"), but current structure treats it as mandatory. Should use conditional or optional flag.

FlipLife action is incorrect. Card text says "Add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards" — this is a deck-to-life transfer, not a life flip. Should be SearchDeck with destination:Life or similar mechanism. FlipLife is for converting Life cards to hand.
PlayFromHand should be optional ("play up to 1"), but structure treats it as mandatory.
